hero.description: Achieve your best version with luxurious touches that pamper your soul and body in our European standard center.
hero.placeholderSub: Premium visual will be placed here

services.title: Personalized
services.desc: Discover premium services that will elevate your beauty to the highest level with our expert team.

hair.title: Hair Design
hair.description: Modern cuts and premium coloring procedures that best suit your facial features and personal style.
hair.process: Consists of comprehensive hair analysis, personalized cut/color design, and styling with elite products.

skin.title: Premium Skin Care
skin.description: We restore the radiance and youth your skin needs using the world's most exclusive dermocosmetic brands.
skin.process: Completed with skin analysis, deep cleansing, serum infusion, and relaxing massage techniques.

makeup.title: Custom Makeup
makeup.description: Long-lasting and porcelain-finish makeup designs applied by our professional makeup artists on your special days.
makeup.process: Skin base preparation, selection of luxury products suitable for your skin type, and professional application.

nails.title: Manicure & Pedicure
nails.description: A medical and spa-focused hand-foot care ritual that prioritizes not only aesthetics but also health.
nails.process: Exfoliation of dead skin, nail form design, and premium polish/gel application.

brows.title: Brow Design
brows.description: Permanent or semi-permanent brow design that enhances your expression, tailored to the golden ratio of the face.
brows.process: Facial measurement, form determination, golden ratio drawing, and gentle shaping procedure.

permanent.title: Permanent Makeup
permanent.description: Lip, eyeliner, or dipliner permanent makeup applications that allow you to wake up fresh and flawless every morning.
permanent.process: Local anesthetic cream, design approval, and application with a medical micro-pigmentation device.

beforeAfter.title: Remarkable
beforeAfter.subtitle: Authentic results achieved by our specialists — every portrait tells a story of renewal
beforeAfter.disclaimer: All imagery features our genuine clients — unretouched and unfiltered.

modal.title: Reserve Your Experience
modal.subtitle: Select your preferred date and our specialists will be ready to welcome you.
modal.placeholderNote: Share any special requests or questions with us...
modal.successText: Our concierge team will contact you shortly. We look forward to welcoming you to Luxe Beauty.

items.q: How long does laser hair removal take?
items.a: Laser hair removal sessions vary between 15 minutes and 1 hour depending on the treatment area.
Thanks to the anesthetic creams applied before the procedure, the sensation of pain is minimized. Many of our clients find the process quite comfortable.

items.q: Are the products you use authentic?
items.a: Yes, all our products are 100% authentic from world-renowned dermocosmetic and medical aesthetic brands.

items.q: How late can I cancel my appointment?
items.a: You can cancel or reschedule your appointment by calling or sending a WhatsApp message at least 24 hours before your scheduled time.

about.title: Years Dedicated to Excellence
about.storyP1: Luxe Beauty believes that beauty is not just about physical appearance, but a matter of inner confidence. With the most exclusive products and world-class specialists, we offer each guest a unique 'escape' where they will feel special.
about.storyP2: Our goal is to highlight your natural beauty in the most luxurious and sterile conditions.

whyUs.title: The Luxury Standard in Beauty
whyUs.f1Desc: We provide the safest environment with hospital-grade sterilization processes.
whyUs.f2Desc: Award-winning master artists, each graduated from global academies in their fields.
whyUs.f3Desc: We use only dermatologically proven, the world's most exclusive luxury brands.

reviews.name: Zeynep Y.
reviews.text: My experience at Luxe Beauty was incredible. The quality of the products and the hygiene of the environment truly feel premium. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Selin A.
reviews.text: The radiance and freshness of my skin after the facial were magnificent. The specialists' attention and personalized approach are wonderful.

reviews.name: Esra D.
reviews.text: I came for brow design and I'm very satisfied with the result. It looks completely natural and exactly as I wanted. Thank you Luxe Beauty!
